# Pull Request Checklist

## Public-Safety Checks

- [ ] This change does not include private runtime evidence.
- [ ] This change does not include keys, credentials, hashes, receipt material, permit material, packet identifiers, or proof bundle details.
- [ ] This change does not expose private topology, hostnames, IP addresses, service definitions, runtime paths, ports, logs, or operational commands.
- [ ] This change does not copy patent or provisional material into the public repository.
- [ ] This change does not provide deployment instructions for private runtime systems.
- [ ] This change does not widen public claims beyond the current claim boundary.
- [ ] Status wording preserves the distinction between public, withheld, staged, planned, and not implemented.

## Change Type

- [ ] Documentation clarity
- [ ] Protocol or architecture wording
- [ ] Claim-boundary tightening
- [ ] Reviewer/business routing
- [ ] Security-boundary correction

## Notes

Summarize the public-safe reason for the change.
